macro.title: Day 3 of LIRR strike brings no clear sign of a deal as NYC commuters cope - CBS News
macro.summary: LIRR commuters are taking shuttle buses and subways into New York City as the largest commuter rail system in North America remains shut down.

macro.title: Contractor Dies at SpaceX’s Starbase Facility in Texas - WSJ
Nasdaq posts back-to-back losses as Micron's decline weighs down tech sector: Live updates - CNBC
macro.summary: Declines in technology led the losses as traders monitored oil prices and bond yields while awaiting further developments with the conflict in the Middle East.

macro.title: Elon Musk Loses Case Against Sam Altman Over OpenAI’s Future - Bloomberg.com
macro.summary: A jury rejected Elon Musk’s claims that OpenAI under Sam Altman’s leadership betrayed its mission to benefit the public by morphing into a for-profit business, finding that he waited too long to sue the company.
